## Workflow

Which workflow is affected?

## Current Problem

What is weak, noisy, slow, or unclear today?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the change you want to see.

## Evidence

Include traces, eval results, examples, or observed failures if available.

## Notes

Add any implementation details or constraints that should be considered.
